Arize.description: Bayer introduced hybrid rice seed in India in 1995 under the brand name Arize with an objective to improve rice productivity, especially amongst smallholder farmers. Arize has been instrumental in increasing farm incomes of millions of farmers in India for 25+ years, thereby delivering on its promise of 'Better Rice, Better Life'. With its capabilities in breeding, development, production and marketing of high-quality, genetically superior hybrid rice seeds, Arize caters to multiple farmer requirements pertaining to graintype, duration, landtype etc. It continues to empower farmers across the country with a sense of control that it offers them with its consistent yield and reliable performance in the most challenging conditions.
features: Leader brand in terms of yield (vs hybrids as well as inbred)
Better Adaptability in adverse agro-climatic conditions - less requirement of water.
High performance seeds with native traits, offering tolerance against Brown Plant Hopper (BPH) & Bacterial Leaf Blight (BLB).
Reliable performance in the most challenging conditions.
Arize.target_audience: Smallholder farmers, farmers looking to improve rice productivity, farmers dealing with challenges and uncertainties related to climate change, water, pests, diseases, farmers seeking consistent yield and ROI.

features: Consistently yielding 20-25% higher than popular inbred varieties
Higher number of productive tillers per plant (13-15)
Suitable for Direct Seeded Rice (DSR) system
